memberdef.argsstring: (ServerCredentials const &InCredentialsRef, ServerSettings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, TSharedPtr< FServerApiClient, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > InServerApiClient=nullptr)
memberdef.name: ServerDSM

memberdef.argsstring: (int32 Port, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &CustomAttribute=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: RegisterServerToDSM

briefdescription.para: send register request to DSM

parameterdescription.para: the port where your game server run.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
A value that will be sent to client that join via armada matchmaking DSNotice event

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (int32 Port, THandler< FAccelByteModelsServerInfo > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &CustomAttribute=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: RegisterServerToDSM

briefdescription.para: send register request to DSM

parameterdescription.para: the port where your game server run.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
A value that will be sent to client that join via armada matchmaking DSNotice event

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &IPAddress, int32 Port, FString const &ServerName, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &CustomAttribute=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: RegisterLocalServerToDSM

briefdescription.para: send register local server to DSM

parameterdescription.para: the machine's IP address this local DS is in.
the port where your game server run.
the server name of this local DS
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
A value that will be sent to client that join via armada matchmaking DS Notice event

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (int32 Port, FString const &ServerName, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &CustomAttribute=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: RegisterLocalServerToDSM

briefdescription.para: send register local server to DSM using public IP this method is using api.ipify.org to get the device's public IP

parameterdescription.para: the port where your game server run.
the server name of this local DS.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
A value that will be sent to client that join via armada matchmaking DSNotice event

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (bool KillMe, FString const &MatchId, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: SendShutdownToDSM

briefdescription.para: send shutdown request to DSM

parameterdescription.para: true if you want DSM to kill your DS. false if your DS already on shutting down state.
Id that you get from DSM-MatchmakingInfoNotif.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: deregister local server to DSM

parameterdescription.para: the server name of this local DS.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Register server's game session to DSM.

parameterdescription.para: the request body.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &SessionId, FString const &GameMode, THandler< FAccelByteModelsServerCreateSessionResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: RegisterServerGameSession

briefdescription.para: Register server's game session to DSM.

parameterdescription.para: the Session ID of the server.
the matchmaker's game mode the server will use.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Get Session ID of a claimed DS. Will return empty string OnSuccess if DS is not claimed yet.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded, The result is const FAccelByteModelsServerSessionResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Get Server Info Will return server information.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded, The result is const FAccelByteModelsServerInfo.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: GetServerTimeout.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: ServerHeartbeat.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Configure automatic shutdown, server will send shutdown request to DSM when there is no player on the DS for some periodical time after the DS is claimed. Must be called before calling RegisterServerToDSM or RegisterLocalServerToDSM.

parameterdescription.para: Tick Second to check the auto shutdown, not bigger than CountdownStart
Countdown for DS Auto Shutdown, set to -1 to disable the Auto Shutdown

briefdescription.para: Set handler delegate for OnAutoShutdown event when DS send shutdown request after no player activity.

parameterdescription.para: This delegate will be called if Auto Shutdown is successful

briefdescription.para: Set handler delegate for OnAutoShutdownError event when DS failed do Shutting down from auto shutdown.

parameterdescription.para: This delegate will be called if DS failed do Shutting down from auto shutdown

briefdescription.para: Set handler delegate for OnHeartbeatSuccess event.

parameterdescription.para: This delegate will be called if the DS heartbeat is sent

briefdescription.para: Set handler delegate for OnHeartbeatError event.

parameterdescription.para: This delegate will be called if the DS heartbeat is not sent

briefdescription.para: Start sending heartbeat at interval.
Stop Heartbeat.
Update values from command line arguments. Used for tests.
DSM API for communicating DS to DSM. DSM server uses WebSocket (RFC 6455) to send matchmaking information to DS.
